top_signals.title: US Consumer Sentiment Rises But Remains Close to Record Low
top_signals.summary: US consumer sentiment rose in June as lower gasoline prices provided some relief for Americans grappling with high inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Cantor Bitcoin SPAC Lets Investors Commit Less as Crypto Slides
top_signals.summary: A blank-check company associated with Cantor Fitzgerald is trying to get investors to support an upcoming crypto deal by allowing them commit less money than they had initially pledged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Stocks Waver at End of Bruising Week for AI Trade: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Another burst of selling pummeled chipmakers, whipsawing stocks once again on concerns over whether vast investments in artificial intelligence will justify the industry’s hefty valuations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Billionaire investor Jeremy Grantham says bitcoin will 'dwindle away with a whimper'
top_signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham renewed his long-running criticism of bitcoin, predicting it will gradually fade into irrelevance over decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indonesia risks deeper power crisis from coal supply failures
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is 'the most expensive market in 'American history'
top_signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Iceland joins TIPS for instant payments
